title: CatModOpti
body:
#  CatModOPti

**CatModOPti** is a lightweight, vanilla-friendly modpack designed to give your game a massive performance boost without losing the classic Minecraft feel. Whether you're playing on a "potato" PC or a high-end rig, these mods ensure your frames stay high and your game stays cool.

It was made with **Performance First** in mind, built on the **Fabric** loader for the best possible frame rates and modern compatibility.

---

### Mod Highlights
To keep your game purring, we’ve included the gold standard of optimization:
* **Sodium** – The engine that makes your FPS skyrocket.
* **Lithium** – Optimizes game logic (mobs, physics) so your CPU can relax.
* **FerriteCore** – Squeezes down memory usage so you can play with less RAM.
* **ImmediatelyFast** – Speeds up rendering of chests, signs, and entities.
* and **MORE!**

---

### 📊 Performance Sheet
See the "purr-formance" boost for yourself! These are the average results from our testing:

| Setup Type | Vanilla FPS | CatModOPti FPS | Improvement |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Low-End (Potato)** | 20-30 FPS | **60-90 FPS** | 3x Faster! |
| **Mid-Range PC** | 80-120 FPS | **250+ FPS** | 2x Faster! |
| **High-End Rig** | 200 FPS | **500+ FPS** | Silky Smooth |

> **Pro Tip:** The lower the render distance the more fps you get

---

###  Give us a Meow! (Feedback)
Found a bug or have a suggestion to make the pack even faster? Don't be a scaredy-cat—I want to hear from you!

*  **Comments:** Leave a comment here on mod's [Github page](https://github.com/16X16PixelCat-Studio/CatModOpti) and or in our [youtube community page](https://www.youtube.com/@16X16PixelCat/community)
*  **Support:** If this pack helped your FPS, consider leaving a **Star** or a **Follow**—it helps more people find the pack!

---
*Thats about it!*
